channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Artificial intelligence changes across the US
item.description: As more companies implement artificial intelligence for daily tasks, some industry leaders are working to push back against certain aspects of the technology.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Canadian news publishers sue OpenAI over alleged copyright infringement
item.description: A coalition of Canadian news publishers, including The Canadian Press, Torstar, Globe and Mail, Postmedia and CBC/Radio-Canada, has filed a lawsuit against OpenAI for using news content to train its ChatGPT generative artificial intelligence system.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Syndicating Blog Posts to Social Media with Micro.blog
item.description: Learn how to automate blog syndication across social media platforms using Micro.blog, its features, limitations, and benefits.
item.dc:creator: Jared Newman, Fast Company

item.title: Cryptocurrency entrepreneur who bought banana art for $6.2 million eats the fruit in Hong Kong
item.description: HONG KONG (AP) — A cryptocurrency entrepreneur who bought a piece of conceptual art consisting of a simple banana, duct-taped to a wall, for $6.2 million last week ate the fruit in Hong Kong on Friday.
item.dc:creator: KANIS LEUNG, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Cryptocurrency entrepreneur who bought banana art for $6.2 million eats the fruit in Hong Kong
item.description: A cryptocurrency entrepreneur who had bought a piece of conceptual art consisting of a simple banana, duct-taped to a wall, for $6.2 million last week ate the fruit in Hong Kong on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Kanis Leung, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: SAFe certification: Launch your Scaled Agile Framework career
item.description: What is SAFe certification? Scaled Agile Framework (SAFe) certifications are becoming valuable in larger organizations looking for efficient project delivery, reduced time-to-market, and ways to provide better stakeholder value.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Canada sues Google over alleged anticompetitive practices in online ads
item.description: Canada’s antitrust watchdog is suing Google over alleged anticompetitive conduct in the tech giant’s online advertising business and wants the company to sell off two of its services and pay a penalty.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: 10 steps to smarter Google account security
item.description: There are important accounts to secure, and then there are important accounts to secure. Your Google account falls into that second category, maybe even with a couple of asterisks and some neon orange highlighting added in for good measure.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Intel’s $7.9B subsidy deal comes at a high price for the chipmaker
item.description: Intel’s $7.86 billion subsidy agreement with the US government imposes strict conditions on the company’s ability to divest stakes in its chipmaking division if the unit becomes independent.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: How Biden’s AI tech could play a role in Trump’s immigration crackdown
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump will return to power next year with a raft of technological tools at his disposal that would help deliver his campaign promise of cracking down on immigration—among them, surveillance and artificial intelligence technology that the Biden administration already uses to he
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Fox host: Podcasters like Rogan have 'earned' seats in White House briefing room
item.description: Fox News host Will Cain said popular podcasters like Joe Rogan have “earned” seats in the White House briefing room. When discussing the potential for a shake-up in the James S.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: Gov. Newsom sets himself up as a foil to Elon Musk and Donald Trump
item.description: (Bloomberg) -- As Elon Musk prepares to wield more power in Washington, the state where he built his fortune is girding for a fight.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Australia's social media ban for kids is closer to becoming law
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Australia’s House of Representatives on Wednesday passed a bill that would ban children younger than 16 years old from social media, leaving it to the Senate to finalize the world-first law.
item.dc:creator: ROD McGUIRK, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Python to C: What’s new in Cython 3.1
item.description: Cython is the most convenient way to bridge C and Python languages and tools in Python programs. Developers use it to write C extensions or wrap C libraries for use in Python. Now, a major new release is on the way.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Federal prosecutors seek records from company that deployed AI weapons scanner on NYC subway
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Federal investigators in New York are seeking records from the manufacturer of an AI-powered weapons scanner that was briefly deployed this summer in New York City’s subway system.
item.dc:creator: JAKE OFFENHARTZ, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Nvidia shows off a new genAI model that can create sound and music
item.description: Nvidia on Monday showed off a new generative AI (genAI) model that can be used to create all kinds of sounds and music: Fugatto (which stands for Foundational Generative Audio Transformer Opus 1).
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: California Governor Gavin Newsom Proposes EV Rebate Program, Excluding Tesla Models
item.description: California Governor Gavin Newsom unveils plans for an electric vehicle rebate program, potentially excluding Tesla models from consumer incentives.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Is Outlook down? Thousands of Microsoft 365 users report outage issues
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Thousands of Microsoft 365 customers worldwide reported having issues with services like Outlook and Teams on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: How to use iPhone's mic mode for crystal-clear, noise-free calls
item.description: Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson reveals how iPhone’s new Automatic Mic Mode adjusts settings for optimal call quality automatically.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Free email services are costing you more than you think
item.description: Free email accounts come with hidden costs to privacy. Technology guru Kurt "CyberGuy" Knutsson explores the risks involved with email accounts.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
